tests.title: SSC MTS Full Mock Test 1 (Session Pattern)
tests.note: Real MTS pattern has NO negative marking in Session 1 (Numerical + Reasoning) and -1 only in Session 2 (GA + English). This engine currently applies one marking scheme test-wide; per-session marking is a planned upgrade.

questions.q: Pointing to a photograph, a man said, "I have no brother or sister, but that man's father is my father's son." Whose photograph was it?
questions.q_hi: एक फोटोग्राफ की ओर इशारा करते हुए...
questions.subject: Reasoning Ability and Problem Solving

questions.q: The Andes Mountains were formed due to the collision of which tectonic plates?
questions.q_hi: एंडीज पर्वत किन टेक्टोनिक प्लेटों के टकराव से बना था?
opts: Pacific Plate and South American Plate
South American Plate and African Plate
Nazca Plate and South American Plate
opts_hi: प्रशांत प्लेट और दक्षिण अमेरिकी प्लेट
दक्षिण अमेरिकी प्लेट और अफ्रीकी प्लेट
नाज़्का प्लेट और दक्षिण अमेरिकी प्लेट
